MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2010 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-09-2010 Set For Trial On Nov-15-10 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Default Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Oren Raphael, Dba Sri Mortgage Group, Only.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Stephen L. Porter, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation.
No appearance by defendant Oren Raphael, dba SRI Mortgage Group.
Default was entered against defendant on February 27, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 100 Bush Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Oren Raphael, dba SRI Mortgage Group as follows:

Damages/Principal - $50,370.98.
Prejudgment Interest $7,521.15.
Attorney's Fees - $6,809.80.
Costs - $469.10, for a total judgment in the amount of $65,171.03.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
